document.title: Dataset Description and Data Definitions
document.subtitle: For Select Datasets on DOT's Open Data Catalog
document.source: U.S. Department of Transportation — Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA)
document.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time

daily_difference.description: Includes records updated or added since the previous run. May include all other records for the carrier/broker/freight forwarder for completeness.

full_baseline.description: Includes all records (including historical values where appropriate) as of the latest dataset update.

datasets.name: Carrier
datasets.description: Records for all carriers/brokers/freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT number, docket number, entity census, authority, and insurance data.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.definition: Mexican Government registration code for Mexican carriers

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance required (in thousands)

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance on file (in thousands)

fields.name: Telephone Number (Business)
fields.definition: Business telephone number, if on file

fields.name: Fax Number (Business)
fields.definition: Business fax number, if on file

fields.name: Telephone Number (Mailing)
fields.definition: Mailing telephone number, if on file

fields.name: Fax Number (Mailing)
fields.definition: Mailing fax number, if on file

datasets.name: Insur
datasets.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked by docket number. Entities can hold multiple policies. The daily difference dataset shows removals as blank records (all empty or 00000 values except docket number).
datasets.notes: For Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD), amounts are in fields 4 and 5. For Types 2, 3, and 4, fields 4 and 5 will be 0.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Maximum liability amount (in thousands). Company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this value.

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (note: policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name)

datasets.name: ActPendInsur
datasets.description: Information on implementation dates of active or pending insurance policies including posted date, effective date, and cancel effective date. Also contains insurance company name, BI&PD limits, and the DOT/docket numbers of the policy holder.
datasets.notes: For Form Codes 91, 91X, and 82, insurance amounts are in fields 8 and 9. For Form Codes 34, 83, 84, and 85, fields 8 and 9 will be 0.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (note: policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name)

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Limit
fields.definition: Maximum liability amount (in thousands). Company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this value.

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

datasets.name: AuthHist
datasets.description: Records showing the history of each authority granted to a carrier/broker/freight forwarder, including dates of original authority action (e.g., granted) and final authority action (e.g., revoked). Multiple authorities per entity means multiple records.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Sub Number
fields.definition: Action sequence number; not commonly used

fields.name: Final Authority Served Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action became effective

datasets.name: BOC3
datasets.description: Records for each BOC3 agent hired by a carrier/broker/freight forwarder. Each entity must hire a BOC3 agent to represent them in legal matters to obtain operating authority. Some entities may act as their own BOC3 agent.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Zip Code
fields.definition: Process agent company address zip code

datasets.name: InsHist
datasets.description: Information on a carrier's/broker's/freight forwarder's previous insurance policies. Contains cancellation method (cancelled, replaced, name change, transferred), policy type, policy number, and effective/cancellation dates. Important: all insurance information relates to the policy being cancelled/replaced/changed — NOT the subsequent policy.
datasets.notes: For Form Codes 91, 91X, and 82, insurance amounts are in fields 12 and 13. For Form Codes 34, 83, 84, and 85, fields 12 and 13 will be 0.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Cancel/Replace/Name Change/Transfer Form
fields.definition: The form that executed the cancellation, replacement, name change, or transfer

values.36: BMC Surety Bond Cancellation Form (for cancelled)
values.85C: BMC Cancellation for Trust Funds (for cancelled)

values.*: Not BIPD (Cargo, Surety, or Trust Fund)

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: For BI&PD form codes: P = Primary, E = Excess

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Underlying limit amount (in thousands). When class code is E, this is the value of the primary insurance.

fields.name: BI&PD Max Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

values.Term/REPL: Replacement executed by a new policy submission

datasets.name: Rejected
datasets.description: Information on insurance forms rejected by FMCSA. Contains policy details, rejection date, and rejection reason (e.g., 'Policy is already cancelled').

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Insurance type associated with the rejected form

fields.name: Maximum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Rejected Date
fields.definition: Date the submitted form was rejected

fields.name: Rejected Reason
fields.definition: The reason the form was rejected

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

datasets.name: Revocation
datasets.description: Information on carrier/broker/freight forwarder authorities revoked by FMCSA. Includes entity identifiers, type of authority revoked, and the reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.definition: Operating authority type: common, contract, or broker

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.definition: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity

disclaimer.purpose: Provided as a public service by FMCSA to enhance public access to information.
disclaimer.nature: Datasets are snapshots at the time of generation. Information is constantly changing.
disclaimer.legal: All information is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a legal contract. Not intended as, nor offered as, legal advice.
disclaimer.liability: FMCSA and its employees are not responsible or liable for any damage or loss caused by use of or reliance on dataset content.
